mapper.select: SELECT category_no AS categoryNo, name FROM category_space ORDER BY category_no

SELECT s.space_no AS num, space_name AS name, '0' AS rating, '0' AS review_num, region AS address, max_capacity AS capacity, price_per_hour AS price, '0' AS isWished, thumbnail_url AS thumbnail FROM space s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT su.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY su.space_no ORDER BY su.unit_no ) rn FROM space_unit su ) su ON s.space_no = su.space_no AND su.rn = 1
category_no = #{category}
AND status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN is_premium = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END FETCH FIRST 4 ROWS ONLY

SELECT space_no AS num, host_id, cat.name AS category, space_name AS name, space_intro, address, detail_addr AS address2 FROM space s LEFT OUTER JOIN category_space cat ON s.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE space_no = #{spaceId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT su.unit_no AS unitNo, title, price_per_hour AS pricePerHour, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, description, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, sp.min_hours AS minHours FROM space_unit su LEFT OUTER JOIN space_policy sp ON su.unit_no = sp.unit_no WHERE space_no = #{spaceId}

SELECT su.unit_no AS unitNo, title, price_per_hour AS pricePerHour, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, description, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, sp.min_hours AS minHours FROM space_unit su LEFT OUTER JOIN space_policy sp ON su.unit_no = sp.unit_no WHERE su.unit_no = #{unitId}
